Homework11

HudsonPlaskoff

2026-04-18

Origin and Destination Pairs1

pairs <- flights %>%
  group_by(origin,dest) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n()
  )
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'origin'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
knitr::kable(pairs %>% head())
origin dest n
EWR ALB 439
EWR ANC 8
EWR ATL 5022
EWR AUS 968
EWR AVL 265
EWR BDL 443

Latitudes and Longitudes of Origin Airports2

pairs <- pairs %>%
  left_join(airports, join_by(origin==faa)) %>%
  select(origin,dest,n,lon,lat) %>%
  rename(
    origin_lon = lon,
    origin_lat = lat
  ) %>%
  relocate(origin_lon, origin_lat, .before=dest)

knitr::kable(pairs %>% head())
origin origin_lon origin_lat dest n
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 ALB 439
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 ANC 8
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 ATL 5022
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 AUS 968
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 AVL 265
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 BDL 443

Latitudes and Longitudes of Destination Airports3

pairs <- pairs %>%
  left_join(airports, join_by(dest==faa)) %>%
  select(origin,origin_lon,origin_lat,dest,n,lon,lat) %>%
  rename(
    dest_lon = lon,
    dest_lat = lat
  ) %>%
  relocate(dest_lon, dest_lat, .before=n)

knitr::kable(pairs %>% head())
origin origin_lon origin_lat dest dest_lon dest_lat n
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 ALB -73.80169 42.74827 439
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 ANC -149.99636 61.17436 8
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 ATL -84.42807 33.63672 5022
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 AUS -97.66989 30.19453 968
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 AVL -82.54181 35.43619 265
EWR -74.16867 40.6925 BDL -72.68322 41.93889 443

Map of United States4

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = map_data("state") ,
    mapping = aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = NA, color = "gray"
  ) +
  coord_fixed(1.3)

Map of United States with Flights5

ggplot(pairs) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = map_data("state") ,
    mapping = aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = NA, color = "gray"
  ) +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  geom_segment(aes(
    x=origin_lon,
    xend=dest_lon,
    y=origin_lat,
    yend=dest_lat
      ),
    alpha=0.2
    )
## Warning: Removed 7 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_segment()`).

Map of United States with Filtered Flights6

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = map_data("state") ,
    mapping = aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = NA, color = "gray"
  ) +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  geom_segment(
    data=pairs,
    mapping=aes(
      x=origin_lon,
      xend=dest_lon,
      y=origin_lat,
      yend=dest_lat
    ),
    alpha=0.2
    )
## Warning: Removed 7 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_segment()`).
